name: Develocity
description: Build acceleration and analytics platform for Gradle, Maven, Bazel, and sbt monorepos (formerly Gradle Enterprise). Provides remote build caching, build scans, and predictive test selection.

seo.title: Develocity — Monorepo & Build Systems
seo.meta_description: Develocity: Build acceleration and analytics platform for Gradle, Maven, Bazel, and sbt monorepos (formerly Gradle Enterprise). Provides remote build caching, b

when_to_use: Remote build caching for Gradle, Maven, and Bazel monorepos
Predictive test selection to skip unaffected test cases
Build scan diagnostics for slow CI pipeline analysis
Distributed test execution across build agents

pros: Dramatic CI and local build speedups via caching
Build scans reveal slow tasks and flaky tests fast
Predictive test selection cuts test time
Supports Gradle, Maven, Bazel, and sbt
cons: Enterprise pricing tier only, no small-team plan
Significant setup to wire into CI correctly
Data locality and compliance add deployment work
review.verdict: Clear winner for large JVM monorepos with painful builds; hard to justify for smaller codebases or non-JVM stacks.
review.best_for: Enterprises with large Gradle, Maven, or Bazel monorepos and slow CI
review.not_for: Small teams, non-JVM stacks, or budget-constrained startups
